## Meeting purpose

[Deep dive discussion with Kerry to align on the content strategy and plan for the next few months for home base.](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agreed to move to using more stock images to increase content production capacity](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Will focus on a mix of top-of-funnel (tofu), middle-of-funnel (mofu), and some "pink cloud" content](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Discussed leveraging zero-volume keywords as an opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Need to set up better analytics/reporting to measure content performance and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=2706.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Capacity

  - [Currently at \~7 new pieces and 5 refreshes per week](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Could increase to \~10 new and 5 refreshes by using stock images instead of custom image generation](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Potential to further increase capacity by adding more resources](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)

### Content Mix

  - [20% "pink cloud" (about the audience, not directly product-related)](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [60% tofu (how-to, informational)](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [20% mofu (evaluating solutions)](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [No bofu (product-specific) content for now](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=1961.0)

### Starter vs. Operational Businesses

  - [Main personas: Starters (pre-launch) and operational (recently launched)](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=2191.0)
  - [Focus on starter content for now as easier to acquire and can build loyalty](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=2209.0)
  - [Operational/multi-business owners are a future opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=2247.0)

### Zero-Volume Keywords

  - [Leveraging zero-volume keywords based on organic traffic patterns](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Allows targeting of long-tail opportunities competitors may miss](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Plan to incorporate this into the content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)

### Reporting/Analytics

  - [Currently lack full visibility into conversions from content](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=2706.0)
  - [Need to set up better reporting, potentially using Amplitude directly](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=2820.0)
  - [Will aim to report on keyword/traffic growth by funnel stage](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=2975.0)

## Next Steps

  - Kerry to populate a working doc with initial mix/capacity recommendations
  - Marcel/Jimmy to review and provide feedback
  - [Regroup next week to finalize quarterly roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=3567.0)
  - [Set up better conversion tracking/reporting](https://fathom.video/share/vZfLCwEt6waacc1M3BcyqQoWJipsiK6L?tab=summary&timestamp=2706.0)
